title: Populate all database tables with minimum 50 valid records each

requirements.text: Expand the backend/ingredient-store.mo ingredient database to contain at least 50 valid ingredient records with complete information including name, safety classification (safe/conditional/risky/harmful), description of effects, suitable skin types array, and concern flags (acne-prone, sensitive, clog-prone)

quotes: each table must contain a minimum of 50 valid records for data validation

acceptanceCriteria: Ingredient database contains at least 50 unique ingredient records
Each ingredient has all required fields populated: name, safety classification, description, suitable skin types, concern flags
Ingredients cover diverse categories: antioxidants, peptides, botanical extracts, humectants, emollients, preservatives, texturizers, UV filters, alcohols, silicones, etc.
All ingredient data is scientifically accurate and realistic

requirements.text: Expand the product database in backend/main.mo to contain at least 50 valid product records with complete information including product name, brand, description, suitable skin types array, key ingredients array, product category, price range, and concerns addressed

quotes: each table must contain a minimum of 50 valid records for data validation

acceptanceCriteria: Product database contains at least 50 unique product records
Each product has all required fields populated: name, brand, description, suitable skin types, key ingredients, category, price range, concerns
Products cover all major categories: cleansers, serums, moisturizers, sunscreens, treatments, toners, masks, exfoliants
Products represent diverse skin type suitability (oily, dry, combination, sensitive, normal)
Each product lists realistic ingredient combinations and addresses specific skin concerns

requirements.text: Create seed data initialization in backend/main.mo that populates the users table with at least 50 valid test user records including unique principal IDs, names, email addresses (optional), timestamps, and associated skin type results covering diverse skin types and concern combinations

quotes: each table must contain a minimum of 50 valid records for data validation

acceptanceCriteria: User seed data contains at least 50 unique user records
Each user has realistic data: unique principal ID, name, timestamp
Users have varied skin type results (oily, dry, combination, sensitive, normal)
Users have diverse skin concern profiles (acne, pigmentation, aging, dryness combinations)
Seed data can be initialized on canister deployment or via admin function

requirements.text: Generate seed data for the skin_type_results table in backend/main.mo with at least 50 valid analysis records linked to seed users, including complete data for detected skin type, concern levels (acne, pigmentation, aging, dryness), timestamp, and questionnaire responses

quotes: each table must contain a minimum of 50 valid records for data validation

acceptanceCriteria: Skin type results seed data contains at least 50 records
Each result is linked to a valid user from the users seed data
Results include complete concern level data with realistic severity values
Timestamps show realistic date distributions over time
Questionnaire response data is complete and valid for each result

requirements.text: Create seed data for the favorites table in backend/main.mo with at least 50 valid favorite records distributed across seed users, linking users to products they have favorited with timestamps

quotes: each table must contain a minimum of 50 valid records for data validation

acceptanceCriteria: Favorites seed data contains at least 50 records
Each favorite record links a valid user to a valid product
Users have varied numbers of favorites (some with many, some with few)
Timestamps show realistic date distributions
No duplicate user-product combinations exist

requirements.text: Generate seed data for the routines table in backend/main.mo with at least 50 valid routine records distributed across seed users, including routine names (e.g., 'Morning Routine', 'Night Routine'), descriptions, and associated routine steps with product assignments, sequence orders, and frequency values

quotes: each table must contain a minimum of 50 valid records for data validation

acceptanceCriteria: Routines seed data contains at least 50 routine records
Each routine is linked to a valid user and includes multiple routine steps
Routine steps reference valid products in correct sequence order
Routines have realistic names and frequencies (daily, twice daily, weekly)
Steps are ordered logically (cleanser before serum, moisturizer after serum, etc.)

requirements.text: Create seed data for the product_notes table in backend/main.mo with at least 50 valid product note records distributed across seed users and products, including star ratings (1-5), notes text, usage experience descriptions, and timestamps

quotes: each table must contain a minimum of 50 valid records for data validation

acceptanceCriteria: Product notes seed data contains at least 50 records
Each note is linked to a valid user and valid product
Star ratings range from 1 to 5 with realistic distribution
Notes text and usage experiences are descriptive and varied
Timestamps show realistic date distributions

requirements.text: Generate seed data for the analysis_history table in backend/main.mo with at least 50 valid analysis history records showing users' skin analysis results over time, including timestamps spanning several months to demonstrate progress tracking functionality

quotes: each table must contain a minimum of 50 valid records for data validation

acceptanceCriteria: Analysis history seed data contains at least 50 records
Records are distributed across users with some users having multiple analyses
Timestamps span multiple months showing temporal progression
Concern levels vary over time to demonstrate improvement or changes
Each history record contains complete skin type and concern data

requirements.text: Implement a backend admin function or initialization routine in backend/main.mo that populates all database tables with the complete seed data sets (users, products, ingredients, skin type results, favorites, routines, product notes, analysis history) to ensure minimum 50 valid records in each table for comprehensive data validation and testing

quotes: each table must contain a minimum of 50 valid records for data validation

acceptanceCriteria: Admin initialization function successfully populates all tables with seed data
Function can be called during canister deployment or manually by admin
All referential integrity constraints are maintained (foreign key relationships)
Function includes validation to prevent duplicate initialization
Seed data initialization completes without errors and all tables contain at least 50 records

constraints: Maintain referential integrity across all seed data (users must exist before linking to their results, products must exist before favorites, etc.)
Respect the single-actor architecture in backend/main.mo for all seed data logic
Ensure seed data is realistic and scientifically accurate for skincare ingredients and products
Do not modify existing user data or production data when initializing seed records
nonGoals: Implementing a database migration system for existing user data
Creating a UI for managing seed data
Implementing external API integrations for product data
